title: AE Style Mekanism
description: New AE resource pack is so great, so what about Applied l'Mekansim?
body:
## About
What is this? This is a resource pack for **Mekanism**, it changed Mekanism GUI and let it become **Applied Energistics 2**_(new resource pack)_ like.
